headlines.title: Iraq Denies U.S. Claim Deputy Minister Helped Iran’s Oil Sales
headlines.summary: Iraq’s Oil Ministry has denied that its deputy minister was involved in opaque sales of Iraqi oil mixed with Iranian crude for Iran’s benefit, as the U.S. alleged on Thursday when it sanctioned the senior official.
